title: amaracus × lirius
intro: Amaracus × lirius, also known as Datura stramonium, is a plant species that belongs to the nightshade family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anticholinergic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Datura stramonium include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and treat conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and epilepsy. The herbal preparations of Datura stramonium include tea, tincture, and infusion, but caution should be taken as it can be toxic in large quantities.
